problem:
There are real numbers $x,y,h$ and $k$ that satisfy the system of equations$$
x^2 + y^2 - 6x - 8y = h
$$$$
x^2 + y^2 - 10x + 4y = k
$$What is the minimum possible value of $h+k$?

$\textbf{(A) }-54 \qquad
\textbf{(B) }-46 \qquad
\textbf{(C) }-34 \qquad
\textbf{(D) }-16 \qquad
\textbf{(E) }16 \qquad$
